  - standard verification round

  READ_FIRST:
  - AGENTS.md
  - work/README.md
  - verify/README.md
  OUTPUTS:
  - /verify note first
  - .pipeline/claude_handoff.md (STATUS: implement, CONTROL_SEQ: 258)
  - .pipeline/gemini_request.md (STATUS: request_open, CONTROL_SEQ: 258)
  - .pipeline/operator_request.md (STATUS: needs_operator, CONTROL_SEQ: 258)
  RULES:
  - keep one exact next slice or one exact operator decision only
  - if you write .pipeline/operator_request.md, keep STATUS/CONTROL_SEQ in the first 12 lines and also include REASON_CODE,
  OPERATOR_POLICY, DECISION_CLASS, DECISION_REQUIRED, BASED_ON_WORK, and BASED_ON_VERIFY near the top
  - if the only blocker is next-slice ambiguity, overlapping candidates, or low-confidence prioritization, open .pipeline/
  gemini_request.md before .pipeline/operator_request.md
  - use .pipeline/operator_request.md without Gemini only for a real operator-only decision, approval/truth-sync blocker, immediate safety
  stop, or when Gemini is unavailable/already inconclusive
  - if same-day same-family docs-only truth-sync already repeated 3+ times, do not choose another narrower docs-only micro-slice; choose
  one bounded docs bundle or escalate
